step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("effect of rotavirus vaccination on rotavirus genotype distribution")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First write up to two sentences analyzing the evidence and agreeing/disagreeing with prior conclusions, then state your answer choice clearly.
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I note that while the documents describe dramatic reductions in rotavirus disease burden post-vaccination, they do not specifically report changes in the predominant rotavirus genotypes. Several references mention shifts in disease patterns — like loss of seasonality and geographic variation — but none detail shifts in genotype dominance attributable to vaccination. This aligns with earlier concerns that genotype dynamics remain poorly documented despite observed declines in case numbers.

First write up to two sentences analyzing the evidence and agreeing/disagreeing with prior conclusions, then state your answer choice clearly.
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I note that while the documents describe dramatic reductions in rotavirus disease burden post-vaccination, they do not specifically report changes in the predominant rotavirus genotypes. Several references mention shifts in disease patterns — like loss of seasonality and geographic variation — but none detail shifts in genotype dominance attributable to vaccination. This aligns with earlier concerns that genotype dynamics remain poorly documented despite observed declines in case numbers. \boxed{B}
